all_candidates.topic: Is AI automation threatening Indian IT jobs?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Reports last week (July 5-9, 2026) indicated India's IT sector is experiencing "silent layoffs," with 25,000-35,000 jobs potentially lost in 2026 due to AI automation.

all_candidates.topic: Should consumers choose their fuel blend?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Protests occurred in Delhi last week over the mandatory implementation of E20 petrol, with motorists demanding a choice for unblended fuel.

all_candidates.topic: Should Mumbai enforce permanent WFH during monsoons?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Maharashtra issued a work-from-home advisory and shut schools/colleges last week (July 6-7, 2026) due to heavy monsoon rains in Mumbai.

all_candidates.topic: Are global AI layoffs justified by efficiency?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Microsoft announced 4,800 global layoffs last week (July 6, 2026), citing AI investment and efficiency drives.

all_candidates.topic: Should exam bodies be more transparent?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Maharashtra TET paper leak remains unresolved last week, with a new exam date yet to be announced (July 13, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Is CBSE failing Class 10 students with delays?
all_candidates.news_anchor: CBSE Class 10 second board exam results remained pending for 52 days as of last week (July 12, 2026), raising concerns for Class 11 admissions.

all_candidates.topic: Should E20 fuel be labeled 'experimental'?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Attorney General R. Venkataramani reportedly told a court hearing last week (July 3, 2026) that E20 was an "experiment" whose results would only come out next year, intensifying the controversy.

all_candidates.topic: Is biometric UPI authentication truly secure?
all_candidates.news_anchor: UPI biometric authentication-based payments surged past 611 million transactions in June 2026, with RuPay Credit Card integration enabling PIN-free credit payments, reported last week (July 9, 2026).

all_candidates.topic: Should FSSAI fine food delivery platforms more?
all_candidates.news_anchor: FSSAI issued notices to Swiggy Instamart last week (July 13, 2026) for allegedly delivering spoiled and expired food products.

all_candidates.topic: Is government dismissing E20 concerns fairly?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The Oil Ministry and Minister Hardeep Singh Puri last week dismissed motorist complaints about E20 petrol as "misrepresentation," despite acknowledging a 3-5% reduction in fuel economy.

all_candidates.topic: Do new RBI rules protect consumers enough?
all_candidates.news_anchor: The RBI implemented a new framework effective July 1, 2026, allowing refunds/compensation for financial losses due to mis-selling of financial products by banks.

all_candidates.topic: Are new UPI operational limits beneficial?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Recent UPI operational changes, widely discussed last week (around July 8, 2026), include limits on balance enquiries and transaction status checks to reduce system load.

all_candidates.topic: Should companies prioritize upskilling over layoffs?
all_candidates.news_anchor: India's employment outlook for July-September 2026 cooled, as reported last month (June 9, 2026), with companies adopting a more cautious hiring stance amid global uncertainties.

all_candidates.topic: Should India rapidly expand global UPI?
all_candidates.news_anchor: PM Modi announced last week (July 11, 2026) plans to link India's UPI with New Zealand's and Indonesia's fast payment systems.

all_candidates.topic: Are revised credit card lounge rules fair?
all_candidates.news_anchor: HDFC Bank revised credit card lounge access rules effective July 1, 2026, requiring a minimum spend of ₹60,000 in the prior quarter.

all_candidates.topic: Should private rituals be allowed on trains?
all_candidates.news_anchor: A viral video last week (July 13, 2026) showed a puja being conducted inside a privately booked train saloon car, sparking debate.

all_candidates.topic: Should Aadhaar email updates always be free?
all_candidates.news_anchor: UIDAI announced free Aadhaar email address updates until December 31, 2026, effective July 1, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Are increased passport fees justified?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Passport service fees for normal and Tatkaal applications increased, effective July 1, 2026.

all_candidates.topic: Is the 40% GST slab effective for luxury?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Recent articles (July 10, 2026) discussed the ongoing application of the new 40% GST slab for luxury and sin goods, implemented as part of GST 2.0 reforms from September 2025.

all_candidates.topic: Has GST 2.0 simplified India's tax system?
all_candidates.news_anchor: Articles from last week (July 10, 2026, referring to changes from September 2025) highlighted the ongoing impact of GST 2.0 reforms, which simplified tax slabs to 0%, 5%, 18%, and 40%.
